title: neoporteria woutersiana
intro: Neoporteria woutersiana, also known as the Andean cat's claw, is a medicinal plant native to the Andes in South America, belonging to the Passifloraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, making it a valuable resource for various medicinal preparations. The health benefits of Neoporteria woutersiana include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
